overall.description: A static shot from a high-rise luxury bedroom in a futuristic city, likely from Cyberpunk 2077. The camera overlooks an unmade bed toward floor-to-ceiling windows revealing a dense urban skyline with a palm tree visible outside. The scene is lit by diffused natural light from the overcast sky outside mixed with interior ambient lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: luxury high-rise bedroom with panoramic city view

agents.ego_description: stationary observation of the bedroom interior and the cityscape visible through the window

entered.detail: large unmade bed with white sheets and pillows positioned in the foreground
floor-to-ceiling glass windows spanning the far wall overlooking the city
dense futuristic urban skyline with tall buildings visible through the window
single palm tree visible outside the window against the city backdrop
dark wooden nightstand positioned to the right of the bed
round dark spherical object or lamp sitting on the bedside table
framed artwork or poster on the left wall beside the bed

segments.scene_description: The scene presents a static view of a modern luxury bedroom with an unmade bed in the foreground. Floor-to-ceiling windows reveal a hazy, overcast view of a dense futuristic cityscape with a distinctive palm tree visible among the towers. The room features dark wood flooring, minimalist furniture including a bedside table with a spherical lamp, and framed artwork on the left wall.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a static, contemplative gaze from within a luxury bedroom toward a sprawling, hazy futuristic metropolis. It begins with a focus on the intimate interior, where an unmade bed sits atop dark wood flooring beside a minimalist bedside table and a spherical lamp. As the eye moves past the interior elements and framed artwork on the wall, the perspective expands toward the floor-to-ceiling windows. The scene finally settles on the overcast urban skyline, where dense towers rise through a thick haze and a single palm tree stands out against the gray city backdrop.
